testcase.name: lookuptranferBillToCustomerDeposit

failure.message: expected [{"TranferBillToCustomerDeposit":[{"Id":2,"Description":"Refund of Difference"},{"Id":3,"Description":"Full Refund"}]}] but found [{"result":{"Success":false,"Message":"Not Found"}}]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"TranferBillToCustomerDeposit":[{"Id":2,"Description":"Refund of Difference"},{"Id":3,"Description":"Full Refund"}]}] but found
